message.content: @startuml title Remove Bag Effect participant Virologist participant Bag Virologist -> Bag : 1 removeEffect(virologist) activate Bag Bag -> Bag : 2 getExtraInventorSize() activate Bag Bag --> Bag : 3 extraInventorSize deactivate Bag Bag -> Virologist : 4 getInventorSize() activate Virologist Virologist --> Bag : 5 inventorSize deactivate Virologist note over Virologist,Bag Decreas the inventor size by the bag's extra inventor size end note Bag -> Virologist : 6 setInventorySize(inventorSize - extraInventorSize) activate Virologist Virologist --> Bag : 7 deactivate Virologist Bag --> Virologist : 8 deactivate Bag @enduml
